nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive Dart/Flutter coding style guide covering formatting, immutability, naming conventions, null safety, sealed types with pattern matching (Dart 3+), error handling, async/Futures, import ordering, and code generation guidelines for Claude Code agents.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Dart/Flutter-specific Claude Code hook configuration guide, prescribing PostToolUse hooks for auto-formatting and analysis, recommended settings.json snippets, pre-commit check scripts, and useful one-liner shell commands for Dart projects.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Deep guide to Dart/Flutter architectural patterns including Repository, BLoC/Cubit state management, Riverpod, dependency injection, ViewModel, UseCase, immutable state with freezed, clean architecture layer boundaries, and GoRouter navigation — with annotated code examples throughout.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Dart/Flutter security rules covering secrets management (flutter_secure_storage, envied), HTTPS/certificate pinning, input validation, data protection, Android-specific hardening, iOS keychain usage, WebView security, and release build obfuscation.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Dart/Flutter testing guide covering the test/flutter_test framework, unit vs widget vs integration test types, BLoC testing with bloc_test, Riverpod ProviderContainer testing, widget tests, fakes-over-mocks strategy, async testing, golden tests, test naming and organization conventions, and coverage requirements.
